cases.sql:
SELECT
                l_returnflag,
                l_linestatus,
                sum_qty:        sum(l_quantity),
                sum_base_price: sum(l_extendedprice),
                sum_disc_price: sum(l_extendedprice * (1-l_discount)),
                sum_charge:     sum(l_extendedprice * (1-l_discount) * (1+l_tax)),
                avg_qty:        avg(l_quantity),
                avg_price:      avg(l_extendedprice),
                avg_disc:       avg(l_discount),
                count_order:    count(*)
cases.generated: SELECT l_returnflag, l_linestatus, SUM(l_quantity) AS sum_qty, SUM(l_extendedprice) AS sum_base_price, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount)) AS sum_disc_price, SUM(l_extendedprice * (1 - l_discount) * (1 + l_tax)) AS sum_charge, AVG(l_quantity) AS avg_qty, AVG(l_extendedprice) AS avg_price, AVG(l_discount) AS avg_disc, COUNT(*) AS count_order
